---
name: Data dispute
about: Dispute a value in a FreightUtils reference dataset (ADR, HS, airlines, UN/LOCODE, airports, containers, ULDs, vehicles, Incoterms, emission factors)
title: "[data] <dataset>: <record> — <value disputed>"
labels: data-dispute
---

<!--
Thanks — corrections with an authoritative source are exactly how the
reference layer gets better. One record per issue, please.
-->

**Dataset**
<!-- e.g. airlines / adr / hs / unlocode / airports / containers / uld / vehicles / incoterms / emission-factors -->

**Record ID**
<!-- the identifier the API returns: UN number, IATA/ICAO code, AWB prefix, HS code, UN/LOCODE, container/ULD type code, slug… -->

**Value disputed**
<!-- the field and the value you believe is wrong, exactly as the API/site shows it -->

**What it should be**
<!-- the correct value -->

**Authoritative source URL**
<!-- primary source preferred: the carrier, regulator, or issuing body — not an aggregator.
     Aggregators (SeaRates, IncoDocs, reseller blogs…) republish and don't count as independent. -->

**Edition / date of that source**
<!-- e.g. ADR 2025, WCO HS 2022, carrier page as of 2026-07-01 -->
